prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: marketing still. Story world: Crown of Salt. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Crown of Salt Social Launch Square. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-contrast marketing still with a clean focal read, premium horror mood, and room for external campaign copy to be added later.
source_prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals.
